title: 🚀 v2.0.0: Prompt Lint — Lint AI prompts: clarity, safety, injection risks, template ...
content:
Lint AI prompts: clarity, safety, injection risks, template validity

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)
• Zero dependencies (Python stdlib)
• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/skills/skills/prompt-lint
GitHub: https://github.com/itsPremkumar/prompt-lint
